title: Village Emporium
blurb: A solo roll-and-write game of fantasy commerce
intro_text: Village Emporium is a solo roll and write that requires one sheet to printed out to play! It features a hand-drawn map and art by Ways Unseen.

kind_words.author: Pinayu
kind_words.text: Village Emporium is beautiful, well-designed, and relaxing. I enjoyed a lot my first experience with this cozy TTRPG, and I’m looking forward to playing again soon!

kind_words.author: PuskaHeni
kind_words.text: I love this cozy game, so much fun for such a little price :)

title: Notice Board Kit
blurb: A collection of components to build your own notice boards
intro_text: This is a collection of components that you can use to create your own notice board to share with your players or for use in your game!

kind_words.author: Joey V
kind_words.text: Love this! I’ve been using it at my table. I printed the blank notice board and just attach a bunch of hooks on sticky notes. It’s a great way to remind my players what’s going on around town.

title: Four Adventure Bookmarks
intro_text: Ever wanted to keep a place in a book you were reading whilst also having a great adventure location to hand for your rpg of choice? Well now you can!

kind_words.author: Zombloke
kind_words.text: Just beautiful, always handy to have in the gm kit.

title: Ways Unseen Tiles - Forest Set
blurb: A set of 26 hand-drawn forest tiles including entrances and final boss areas
intro_text: Twenty-six unique, lovingly-crafted, hand-drawn forest tiles that can be combined to provide endless configurations for your forest exploration! Ideal for solo-gamers and DMs alike, the Ways Unseen Forest Tiles typify Ways Unseen's characteristic top-down map style. The pack includes 18 standard tiles, 4 entrance tiles and 4 final area tiles.

title: Ways Unseen Tiles - Dungeon Set
blurb: A set of 26 hand-drawn dungeon tiles including entrances and final boss rooms.
intro_text: Twenty-six unique, lovingly-crafted hand-drawn dungeon tiles can be combined to provide endless configurations for your dungeon exploration! Ideal for solo-gamers and DMs alike, the Ways Unseen Dungeon Tiles typify Ways Unseen's characteristic top-down dungeon style. The pack includes 18 standard tiles, 4 entrance tiles and 4 final area tiles.

title: Ways Unseen Map Pack
blurb: Eight location maps for tabletop gaming
intro_text: The first map pack from cartographer Ways Unseen contains eight lovingly hand-drawn top-down and isometric maps portraying a range of locations including dungeons, a forest fort and cave systems. Included are four larger maps (with two version of each - keyed and non-keyed) and four smaller maps, each with keys and non-keyed versions.
